name: agent invokes a tool NOT on its allowlist (transfer)
CONFUSED DEPUTY: over-privileged agent, low-clearance user -> read classified
agent reads classified when agent AND user are both cleared
agent ceiling caps it: limited agent (max=1) cannot read classified even with cleared user
owner override: agent reads the on-behalf user's OWN record
CONFUSED DEPUTY: over-privileged agent, low-clearance user -> read sensitive
low-ceiling agent never reads classified (default-deny / permit ceiling cap)
P2 IS LOAD-BEARING: agent for a mid-clearance user reads a third-party record at the user's ceiling -> Allow
P2 INTERSECTION GATE: same agent/user, third-party record ABOVE the user's clearance -> Deny
P3 IS LOAD-BEARING: agent reads the delegating user's OWN record above the user's clearance -> Allow
ASI08 one permitted hop: depth-1 sub-agent (ceiling 1, for root human bob) reads at the floor -> Allow
ASI08 P5 IS LOAD-BEARING: depth-2 sub-sub-agent reads even PUBLIC data -> Deny (delegation-depth cap; delete P5 -> flips Allow)
P6 IS LOAD-BEARING: sub-agent's OWN ceiling=2 allows classified, but its recorded parent ceiling=0 (scalar) clamps it -> Deny (per-hop intersection; delete P6 -> flips Allow)
chain clamp still allows the floor: same clamped sub-agent reads PUBLIC data -> Allow

P7 IS LOAD-BEARING (fail-closed): depth-1 sub-agent missing its recorded parent ceiling (the old dangling/fail-open case) would amplify (own ceiling 2), but is refused outright -> Deny (delete P7 -> flips Allow)
